title: ifloga spicata subsp. obovata
intro: Ifloga spicata subsp. obovata, also known as a type of bushy dandelion or Ifloga species, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as kidney stones and arthritis. The health benefits of Ifloga spicata subsp. obovata include reducing inflammation, improving kidney function, and aiding in weight loss. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
